description_long: This is a freestanding, double-sided whiteboard with a sturdy A-frame structure, commonly used in offices, schools, or urban public spaces for presentations or announcements. The main writing surface is a large, smooth, rectangular white panel, bordered by a thin, metallic frame. The frame extends downward to form two angled legs on each side, connected by horizontal support bars for stability. At the base, there is a slatted tray area, likely intended for holding markers or erasers, integrated into the frame. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with no visible wheels or decorative elements. The whiteboard's clean lines and neutral colors make it suitable for a variety of urban environments.
description: A freestanding, double-sided whiteboard with a minimalist metallic A-frame and integrated tray, designed for urban or office use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular white writing surface and the lower frame support.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the A-frame structure and horizontal support bars, as well as the slatted tray at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the opposite white writing surface and frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the A-frame profile and support bars.
